channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PSG and Arsenal set for Champions League final showdown
item.description: For more than ten years, PSG dey struggle for Champions League glory, dey always fall short during knockout stages. Dem spend plenty money on big-name players like Neymar, Messi, and Mbappe but still ...

item.title: U.S. Southern Command Chief Holds Security Talks with Cuban Military Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: The head of U.S. Southern Command, Gen. Francis Donovan, met with Cuban military officials near the U.S. naval base at Guantanamo Bay in what both sides described as a brief but constructive exchange ...

item.title: Pat&Pat expands to a larger dining space in Old Balara, Quezon City

item.title: Trump Declared in Excellent Health After Comprehensive Medical Examination at Walter Reed
item.description: Following a thorough medical assessment at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center, President Donald Trump, aged 79, has been declared in excellent health and fully capable of performing his duti...

item.title: PAGASA Announces Onset of Southwest Monsoon as Rainy Season Nears
item.description: PAGASA officially declared the start of the southwest monsoon, locally known as habagat, on May 30, 2026. According to the weather bureau, recent weather analyses showed the presence of southwesterly ...

item.title: Trump signals possible easing of Strait of Hormuz blockade amid ongoing Iran-US negotiations

item.title: Investigations underway after two explosive devices detonate at Woolworths stores in Pretoria and Bloemfontein
item.description: Two Woolworths stores in South Africa have been affected by separate explosive incidents within a 24-hour period, prompting heightened security measures and an ongoing investigation by law enforcement...

item.title: NBA introduces new draft lottery rules to reduce incentives for losing
item.description: The NBA has officially restructured its draft lottery system to tackle the problem of 'tanking,' where teams deliberately lose games to secure higher draft picks. Starting next year, the lottery will ...

item.title: ICE Agent Arrested in Texas for January Minneapolis Shooting Amid Immigration Operation
item.description: Christian Castro, an ICE agent, has been arrested in Harlingen, Texas, on charges related to a January 14 shooting in Minneapolis, Minnesota. The Hennepin County Attorney’s Office charged him with fou...

item.title: South Africa’s crisis of powerlessness, corruption and misplaced anger towards migrants
item.description: This opinion piece reflects on how power and powerlessness shape social behaviour in South Africa, particularly in the context of rising anti-migrant sentiment. The author uses a simple but powerful a...

item.title: Sting suggests decline in manual labour may be influencing modern masculinity and social behaviour
item.description: Sting has suggested that the decline of manual, physically demanding jobs could be contributing to traits often associated with so-called toxic masculinity. In an interview, the musician reflected on ...

item.title: Audit reveals Defence recovered fraud-related debt from employee and identified weaknesses in misconduct investigations

item.title: Pakistani freelancers earn over $950m in foreign exchange in 10 months, outperform regional peers
item.description: According to data released by the State Bank of Pakistan (SBP), Pakistani freelancers have generated more than $950 million in foreign exchange during the first 10 months of the fiscal year 2025-26 (1...
